description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL Analysis that runs CodeQL security scanning on the repository. Trigger the workflow on push to the master branch, excluding docs and markdown files, and on pull requests to master, excluding drafts and certain file types. Use an ubuntu-latest job with read permissions for actions and contents, and write permission for security events. The job should check out the repository, initialise CodeQL tools for JavaScript security and quality analysis, and perform the CodeQL analysis.
